response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in embedded networking, MACsec, 802.1X, or switch firmware development — all essential for this security-focused embedded role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex systems including open-source projects
Proven track record in DevOps, CI/CD, and testing infrastructure
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX embedded environments or firmware development
Lacks native Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement
No experience with LAN-switch security protocols, Linux kernel analysis, or embedded networking
